judgments.docname: MACAGNINO AND MARZO v. ITALY and CAVALLOTI AND OTHERS v. ITALY [GC question to the parties]
CASE OF PETRIGNANI AND OTHERS v. ITALY
judgments.conclusion: No violation of Article 7 - No punishment without law (Article 7-1 - Nulla poena sine lege;Nullum crimen sine lege);Violation of Article 7 - No punishment without law (Article 7-1 - Nulla poena sine lege;Nullum crimen sine lege);Violation of Article 1 of Protocol No. 1 - Protection of property (Article 1 para. 1 of Protocol No. 1 - Peaceful enjoyment of possessions);Pecuniary damage - claim dismissed (Article 41 - Pecuniary damage;Just satisfaction);Non-pecuniary damage - award (Article 41 - Non-pecuniary damage;Just satisfaction)
judgments.scl: Advisory opinion on the applicability of statutes of limitation to prosecution, conviction and punishment in respect of an offence constituting, in substance, an act of torture [GC], request no. P16 2021 001, Armenian Court of Cassation, § 67, 26 April 2022;Alimuçaj v. Albania, nos. 20134/05, §§ 154
